Healthcare Is Failing Patients at Every Touchpoint

B.x: Healthcare Is Failing Patients at Every Touchpoint

I.title: Misdiagnosis Rates
I.x: 1 in 3 patients receives an incorrect or delayed diagnosis, leading to poor outcomes and preventable harm.

I.title: Excessive Wait Times
I.x: Average 23-day wait to see a specialist. ER delays exceed 4 hours for 40% of patients nationwide.

I.title: Fragmented Data Silos
I.x: Patient records locked across 5+ disconnected systems — no unified view, no actionable insights.

B.x: These three failures compound each other — siloed data causes misdiagnoses, which extend wait times, which overwhelm clinicians further.
B.title: The Compounding Effect
